description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a wooden frame that encases the seat and back. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric, and the sofa is adorned with five loose, plush cushions for added comfort. The armrests are straight and integrated into the wooden frame, matching the back panel in height and material. The sofa stands on four black, metal sled-style legs that provide a sturdy and contemporary base. The overall look is sleek and urban, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as parks, plazas, or stylish public waiting areas. The combination of wood, metal, and fabric gives it a balanced aesthetic of warmth and industrial chic.
description: A modern, rectangular sofa with a wooden frame, dark fabric upholstery, and five loose cushions, supported by black metal sled legs. Its minimalist design and mixed materials make it ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, five loose cushions, and the open seating area framed by wood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden frame, the depth of the seat, and the arrangement of cushions along the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the cushions peeking over the edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's depth, wooden side panel, and cushion placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose, plush cushions: three along the back and two at the sides, all uniform in size and freely arranged on a single bench seat cushion.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, integrated wooden armrests at seat height, flush with the backrest, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four black metal sled legs, positioned at the corners, with a rectangular profile and exposed, modern industrial appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous wooden backrest with loose cushions providing additional support; no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
